setup_task.sh line 55 writes ground truth to this path; export_result.sh line 53 confirms path usage
install_libreoffice_base.sh lines 33-46 downloads from GitHub; create_chinook_odb.py converts SQLite to ODB
Queried official Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite from GitHub master branch; database was recreated on 2025-10-04 per commit ac32dbc
Queried official Chinook database: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Invoice = 412; also confirmed by schemaspy.org Invoice table documentation
Queried official Chinook database: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Invoice WHERE InvoiceDate >= '2009-01-01' AND InvoiceDate < '2010-01-01' = 0; current database has no 2009 invoices
Queried official Chinook database: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM InvoiceLine = 2240

pi_items.verified_value: Task description says to archive 2009 invoices, but current Chinook database has no 2009 data
pi_items.source: task.json lines 30-31 specify archiving invoices where InvoiceDate is in year 2009; this conflicts with actual data
Chinook database is open-source and publicly available on GitHub at https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database; documented as sample database for SQL learning

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the official Chinook Sample Database, a real, publicly available open-source database for SQL learning. The database is downloaded from GitHub and converted to LibreOffice Base ODB format. The database contains 412 invoices and 2240 invoice lines. However, the current version of the Chinook database (as of October 4, 2025) contains invoice dates from 2021-01-01 to 2025-12-22, not 2009 as specified in the task description. This means the task will find 0 invoices to archive for year 2009, contradicting the task's archival objective. The metadata paths are accurately specified: database at /home/ga/chinook.odb and ground truth at /tmp/ground_truth.json.
